title: Jean-Francois Romang
text: Home * People * Jean-Francois Romang Jean-Francois Romang [1] Jean-François Romang , a French computer scientist and chess programmer. Along with Raphael Grundrich and Thomas Adolph , Jean-Francois Romang is co-author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol and UCI compatible chess engine Cassandre , which started as a student project at Louis Pasteur University , Strasbourg [2] . Along with David Rabel , Jean-Francois is co-author the UCI compliant chess engine Gaïa , and wrote the Android UCI compliant GUI ChessPad [3] [4] . Contents 1 PicoChess 2 Forum Posts 3 External Links 4 References PicoChess [ edit ] Jean-François Romang's project PicoChess is a dedicated chess computer based on Stockfish and DGT Board , in the meantime supported by Shivkumar Shivaji and Jürgen Précour .
